title: Ansible Vault passwords should not be disclosed
description: Ansible Vault is used to encrypt sensitive data such as passwords, keys, and certificates within Ansible playbooks and roles. The Vault password is the master key that decrypts all Vault-encrypted content. Exposing it grants access to all secrets protected by Ansible Vault across your entire infrastructure automation.
recommendation: Never store Ansible Vault passwords in source code. Use --vault-password-file with a file outside the repository, use --ask-vault-pass for interactive use, or integrate with external secret managers like HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager via vault password client scripts.
impact: Exposes all secrets encrypted by Ansible Vault including infrastructure passwords, API keys, SSL certificates, and database credentials used across your entire DevOps automation pipeline.

checks.message: Ansible Vault encrypted content detected in source code. While the content itself is encrypted, storing Vault-encrypted data directly in source code without proper access controls means anyone with the Vault password can decrypt it. More critically, nearby code or configuration may contain the Vault password used to encrypt it. Ensure Vault passwords are never stored in the same repository and review surrounding files for password exposure.

Ansible Vault password detected in variable assignment. The Ansible Vault password is the master decryption key for all Vault-encrypted secrets in your infrastructure automation. Exposing this password allows decryption of all Vault-encrypted inventory variables, role defaults, and playbook secrets including database passwords, API keys, SSL private keys, and infrastructure credentials. Rotate the Vault password and re-encrypt all Vault content immediately.

Ansible Vault password file path detected in configuration. While a password file path is not the password itself, hardcoding paths to vault password files in source code reveals the location of sensitive credential files and may indicate that the password file is accessible from the repository or deployment environment. Ensure vault password files are stored outside the repository with restricted permissions.
